summary.lv: Epic Frog meklē datu inženieri, kas attīstīs datu infrastruktūru, veidos datu plūsmas (pipelines) un uzturēs datu noliktavu, integrējot dažādus datu avotus, izmantojot Python, SQL/PostgreSQL un AWS Redshift.
summary.en: Epic Frog is hiring a Data Engineer to develop data infrastructure, build pipelines and maintain a data warehouse, integrating various data sources using Python, SQL/PostgreSQL and AWS Redshift.
